element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player controls green dragon navigating maze without initial power
Grants fire-breathing and dot-eating ability; mandatory for maze completion
Enemies patrolling mazes; threat avoidance is core mechanic
Demonstrates winged demon at screen top directing minions to move maze via pulleys/ropes; squashing hazard introduced
Post-introductory objective; same powers as Crosses; four required for seal progression
Destination for Bible placement; progresses narrative to next maze
Timed collection of six Bonus Boxes; optional enrichment challenge

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching safe zones away from monsters
Maze wall movement pause between Devil commands
typical_tension_triggers: Devil pointing minions to move maze in unpredictable directions
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Alternating pattern of passive maze navigation threat (wall movement) with active evasion threat (monster patrols); power-up dependency creates tension-relief cycles as player seeks Crosses/Bibles to gain temporary invulnerability

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Bonus maze appears between levels as optional enrichment; can be skipped or attempted for extra points

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-like introduction of single maze with Crosses as immediate power-ups; manageable monster density
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of Bible collection objective after first maze; increased spatial complexity as player navigates multiple mazes with dual threat types (monsters + wall movement)
notable_spikes: First maze-moving wall encounter establishes squashing hazard as permanent threat
Transition from Crosses to Bibles introduces longer collection sequences
Bonus maze time pressure creates spike in pacing demand

notable_level_patterns.description: Player navigates Pac-Man-style maze while avoiding monsters; must locate and collect Crosses to gain fire-breathing/dot-eating abilities before maze can be cleared
After initial maze, player must hunt four Bibles scattered across maze and place them into a seal; Bibles function identically to Crosses but exist as persistent post-level objective
Between-level sequences featuring timed collection of six Bonus Boxes; optional but incentivized; appears after Devil transitions between mazes

Devil at screen top commands minions to move outer maze boundary using pulleys/ropes every four directional commands; creates environmental hazard where player can be squished; constant threat throughout all mazes
